narrative: Trump ceasefire headlines and Middle East uncertainty dominate the weekend tape, likely to test USD risk-premium demand at the Tokyo open. GBP/USD closed Friday at 1.3398; risk appetite is likely to support the pair given the +22 CESI beat. USD/JPY closed Friday at 161.67; a bear steepener regime and +260bp OIS carry advantage would support the pair at Sunday's open. Fed tariff warnings and RBNZ hike bias set up NZD/USD for outperformance at the open.
